B) I am not able to come tomorrow.

subject: english
text:
Yudhishtira:" Brother climb the tree and see whether there is any pool or river nearby."
Nakula: " At a little distance I see water."
Yudhishtira: " Brother,please go and bring the water."
Nakula: " Okay” No sooner  he dip his hand in transparent water he heard a voice,  “Stop! Nakula, Do not
drink, this pool is mine."
A) order  B)advise  C) suggestionD) request
B) Yaksha: " This pool is mine, if you disobey you will follow your brothers."
Arjuna: " Who are you? Come and stand up to me, and I will kill you."
A) expressing anger.  B)  suggestion             C) requestD) arguing.
C) Ravi: May I come in sir?
Teacher: Yes,You may.
A) order.B) request. C) seeking permission. D) offering help
d.Yudhishtira: " Brother, Please climb that tree and  see whether there is pool or river nearby."
Nakula: “Okay.”
A) request  B) seeking informationC) suggestionD) asking for clarification
